title: balania harlandii
intro: Balania harlandii, also known as the Balania tree, is a species of evergreen tree that belongs to the family Lauraceae. Traditionally, the plant's bark has been used in various herbal preparations due to its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Balania harlandii are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. The plant's bark can be prepared into teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often used in traditional medicine in certain parts of the world, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
